name: sap-idoc
description: SAP IDoc (Intermediate Document) development skill. Use when creating custom IDoc types, building inbound/outbound processing function modules, configuring partner profiles (WE20), working with ALE/EDI distribution models (BD64), handling IDoc errors and reprocessing (BD87), extending standard IDocs with Z-segments, or monitoring via WE02/WE05. Covers ORDERS, INVOIC, DESADV, SHPMNT, WMMBXY, DELVRY and custom message types across EWM, TM, MM, SD, and FI.
